description_long: This is a rounded, white ceramic cup with a smooth, matte finish and a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The cup features a gold-colored inscription reading 'Tansi Zhang' on its exterior, adding a personalized or branded touch. Its body is bulbous and slightly wider at the base, tapering gently toward the rim, which is thick and rounded for comfortable drinking. The handle is circular and robust, designed for easy gripping. The interior is plain and spacious, suitable for holding liquids such as coffee, tea, or other beverages. There are no visible decorative patterns aside from the text, and the cup appears solid and opaque.
description: A white, rounded ceramic cup with a gold inscription and a single handle, featuring a smooth matte finish and a thick rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold 'Tansi Zhang' inscription and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered and the inscription partially visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, rounded back of the cup with the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cup's smooth, unadorned surface with no handle or inscription visible.
